category_sources: Official Stacked Git site describes StGit as patch stack tooling tightly coupled to Git.
source_facts.description says StGit manages Git commits as a stack of patches.
display_name_sources: Official Stacked Git site uses StGit as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository is linked by the project site as the source repository.
Official Stacked Git site provides getting-started material, tutorial, and online man pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/stacked-git/stgit, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official tutorial describes pushing and popping patches from a stack using Git.
source_facts.description identifies stacked patch management for Git commits.
